golden_rule: Error != stop. Every error is a signal for action, not reason to stall.

steps.step_1: Detect & Log [!] → write to wiki/log.md with type [error], description, context. Always append (>>), never overwrite.
steps.step_2: Analyze — root cause (not just 'error', but why instruction broke)

strategies.schema-patch: contradiction in Schema/AGENTS.md → propose patch to user for review
strategies.source-conflict: two sources say opposite things → mark CONFLICT on page, continue
strategies.dead-end: approach doesn't work (e.g., grep noise) → document reason, change strategy

steps.step_4: Continue — move forward, not stuck on broken instruction

resolution_actions.action: [!] Log: protected zone blocked → local-fix: switch to git add wiki/
[!] Log: truncation detected → local-fix: fallback web_search + get_search_content
[!] Log: schema conflict → schema-patch: propose AGENTS.md patch to user
[!] Log: grep noise → dead-end: switch to wiki/index.md
